title: hieracium umbellatum subsp. canadense
intro: Hieracium umbellatum subsp. canadense, also known as the Canadian hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Hieracium umbellatum subsp. canadense can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal purposes.
